page_metadata.biotools__summary: LoReTTA (Long Read Template Targeted Assembler) is a reference assisted de novo assembler specifically designed to deal with PacBio reads generated from viral genomes. It is a user-friendly tool for assembling viral genomes from PacBio sequence data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: LoReTTA (Long Read Template Targeted Assembler) is a reference assisted de novo assembler specifically designed to deal with PacBio reads generated from viral genomes. It is a user-friendly tool for assembling viral genomes from PacBio sequence data.
